stemHtml: Which of the following procedures is used to identify an NDB station?

options.a: In case of A3 modulation, use the VHF-COM function.
options.b: In case of N0N modulation, use the BFO function.
options.c: In case of A2 modulation, use the ADF function.
options.d: In case of A1 modulation, use the ANT function.
